alkylation reagent: using ascorbate as a reducing agent. We detected by MS the same peptide with carbamidomethylated Cys140
instrument: analyzed by RP-LC-MS/MS in an Easy-nLC II system coupled to an ion trap LTQ-Orbitrap-Velos-Pro mass spectrometer
ionization type: Electrospray ionization (ESI) was done using a Nano-bore emitter
reduction concentration: resuspended in HENS containing 1 mM DTT
